wrapperChain: task_preflight, critical flake8, py_compile groups, test.sh code, test.sh yfinance

reportingCompatibility.limitation: The wrapper replaces external PYTEST_ADDOPTS with its run-scoped cache option and exposes no canonical reporting passthrough; the authoritative command was not substituted.

residualUnknowns: No JUnit XML or per-test duration ranking is available because the wrapper replaces external PYTEST_ADDOPTS and has no reporting passthrough.
The exact introducing commit was not bisected; all 402 blocking outcome IDs already reproduce at T512.
F02, F12, F17, and F19 still require owner decisions between product correction and stale expectation; assignments are complete and do not authorize changing tests to match behavior.
The 11 warnings are non-blocking census context and are not assigned as failures.
